summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fair Price Catalogue feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working perfectly with full multi-language support.
passed_tests: GET /api/catalogue returns 8 catalogue items with correct structure
All catalogue items have EUR and MAD prices with expected values
Catalogue section displays with title 'The Fair Price Experience Catalogue (2026)'
Desktop table view shows 4 columns with proper data
Mobile card view displays all 8 catalogue items correctly
Ethical commitment section 'Zero Margin, 100% Experience' visible
3 commitment cards present: No commission, Total transparency, Our mission
Fair Prices navigation link works correctly
Multi-language support working for FR/ES/DE/PT translations
All activity icons displayed correctly in both desktop and mobile views
Price formats and values match API specification exactly
